description: Operational memory budget as a percentage of total memory for this repository's heavy checks.
Maximum free-storage percentage to treat as the repository swap budget.
GiB cap for the repository swap budget.
Serial fallback or parallel-mode safe stop is used when available memory drops below this percent of the repository memory budget.
Allow explicit repo-local safe cleanup when the command uses --safe.
Delete safe cleanup targets regardless of age when zero; otherwise require target age to exceed this many hours.
Require --safe before any cleanup deletion can occur.
